description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named range-v3 CI that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should run a matrix of build jobs with various configurations, including different operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest), compilers (GCC 6-10, Clang 5.0-10, AppleClang, MSVC 2022), C++ standards (C++14, C++17, C++20), and build types (Debug, Release).
